skill.name: grammar-and-style-enhancer
skill.description: Improves text quality by enhancing grammar, vocabulary, narrative clarity, flow, pacing, and writing style while preserving the author's voice.
skill.summary: Enhances grammar, clarity, tone, flow, and style while preserving the writer's intent.
skill.author: Amraha-Anwar

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged four suspicious keyword patterns in SKILL.md, but review found only writing guidance prose. No commands, scripts, network access, filesystem access, credential handling, or prompt injection attempts were found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Keyword
low_findings.description: The line contains the skill description for grammar and style editing. No cryptographic algorithm, code, hash function, or security-sensitive operation is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The finding is plain frontmatter text describing writing improvements. There is no executable code or cryptographic context.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Keyword
low_findings.description: The line instructs the assistant to add descriptive imagery during editing. This is normal writing guidance and does not reference cryptography or unsafe algorithms.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The phrase is semantic writing guidance. No code, library call, algorithm name, or data transformation is present.

low_findings.title: False Positive: System Reconnaissance Keyword
low_findings.description: The line tells the assistant to avoid altering meaning, voice, or narrative intent. It does not request system inspection, host data, or environment discovery.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The surrounding section is about preserving author intent. There is no command or instruction related to system reconnaissance.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Network Reconnaissance Keyword
low_findings.description: The line asks the assistant to improve dialogue naturalness. It does not request network scanning, connections, external URLs, or discovery of network resources.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The context is fiction and prose editing. No network behavior or tooling is described.

content.value_statement: Drafts often lose impact because grammar, tone, flow, and pacing are uneven. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code to edit text while preserving the author's voice.
actual_capabilities: Asks for the text, preferred tone, and editing depth before revising.
Checks grammar, punctuation, sentence structure, word choice, and repetition.
Improves paragraph flow, readability, cohesion, pacing, and rhythm.
Can rewrite sentences for clarity and stronger emotional tone.
Returns an improved version, a change summary, and style suggestions.
limitations: Does not verify facts, citations, legal claims, or technical accuracy.
Requires user input for tone and edit level when the goal is unclear.
May need human review for sensitive, specialized, or publication-critical writing.
Does not provide automated file processing or batch document workflows.

use_cases.title: Polish Professional Messages
use_cases.description: Improve emails, proposals, and updates for clarity, grammar, tone, and readability.

use_cases.title: Revise Creative Scenes
use_cases.description: Strengthen narrative flow, dialogue naturalness, emotional tone, pacing, and descriptive imagery.

use_cases.title: Improve Learning Drafts
use_cases.description: Edit essays and assignments while preserving meaning, voice, and original intent.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Proofread
prompt_templates.scenario: A short draft needs grammar and punctuation improvements.
prompt_templates.prompt: Improve the grammar and punctuation in this text. Keep my meaning and voice unchanged. Use a light edit level: [paste text].

prompt_templates.title: Tone Adjustment
prompt_templates.scenario: A message needs a specific tone without changing the substance.
prompt_templates.prompt: Revise this text for a [formal/casual/warm/direct] tone. Improve clarity and flow, but keep the same intent: [paste text].

prompt_templates.title: Creative Rewrite
prompt_templates.scenario: A fiction passage needs stronger pacing and imagery.
prompt_templates.prompt: Edit this scene with a medium rewrite. Improve pacing, rhythm, dialogue naturalness, and descriptive imagery while preserving character voice: [paste text].

prompt_templates.title: Detailed Style Review
prompt_templates.scenario: A mature draft needs revision plus editorial feedback.
prompt_templates.prompt: Perform a heavy style edit on this draft. Return the improved version, a change summary, and focused suggestions for future stylistic improvement: [paste text].

output_examples.input: I wanted to say that the report is finish but maybe it still needs some fix.
output_examples.output: Improved version: I wanted to let you know that the report is finished, although it may still need a few revisions. Change summary: Corrected grammar, improved word choice, and made the sentence more professional.

output_examples.input: She walked in the room and felt sad because everything looked old.
output_examples.output: Improved version: She stepped into the room and felt a quiet sadness settle over her as she took in the worn furniture and faded walls. Change summary: Added emotional tone, stronger imagery, and smoother pacing.

output_examples.input: Can you check this paragraph for flow and make it sound more confident?
output_examples.output: The skill would ask for the paragraph, preferred tone, and edit level, then provide an improved version with a concise summary of changes.

best_practices: Provide the target tone and edit level before asking for revisions.
Tell the assistant which meaning, voice, or phrases must stay unchanged.
Review the change summary before accepting major rewrites.
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill as a fact checker or citation validator.
Do not request a heavy rewrite when you need only proofreading.
Do not submit private or sensitive text unless your tool environment permits it.

faq.question: Does this skill preserve my original meaning?
faq.answer: Yes. The instructions explicitly tell the assistant to avoid changing meaning, character voice, and narrative intent.

faq.question: Can it edit fiction?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes guidance for pacing, rhythm, dialogue naturalness, emotional tone, and descriptive imagery.

faq.question: Can it handle formal writing?
faq.answer: Yes. You can request a formal tone and choose light, medium, or heavy editing.

faq.question: Will it explain what changed?
faq.answer: Yes. The requested output includes an improved version, a change summary, and style suggestions.

faq.question: Does it run scripts or access files?
faq.answer: No evidence found. The skill file contains only text instructions for editing user-provided writing.

faq.question: Is it suitable for final publication review?
faq.answer: It can improve readability and style, but human review is still recommended for important publications.
